name: Megha Agarwal

professionalSummary: Senior Consultant with 10+ years of experience in designing, developing, and implementing scalable software solutions across Linux-based environments. Proven expertise in Python development and automation, SQL/PL-SQL, and CI/CD pipeline engineering using GitLab and Jenkins. Strong background in containerization with Docker, infrastructure automation, and production-grade scripting using Python, Shell, and Perl. Adept at collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality, secure, and reliable systems while optimizing performance and deployment workflows. Recognized for problem-solving, ownership, and mentoring junior engineers.
